news.t: First Trust Launches a Balanced Income ETF

overview.description: The First Trust Balanced Income ETF (FTBI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund tracks an index with tiered allocations to exchanged-traded funds across three asset classes: equity, investment grade fixed income, and commodities. The strategy applies a focus on income generation to each asset class FTBI was launched on May 28, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Bloomberg Moderate Allocation Income Focus Index

data.title: First Trust Launches a Balanced Income ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
